Schneider LA et al. (2007): Review synthesis - wound pH recovery timeline

Alkaline wound pH (7.2-7.4) from serum exposure; recovery to acidic pH (5.5) via tissue metabolism and re-epithelialization. Acid mantle restoration requires stratum corneum regrowth, so recovery is delayed until re-epithelialization begins (day 5-7). Normalized: 1.0 = alkaline wound, 0.0 = normal acidic skin.
